extraction.one_line_summary: YATES Adam won TTT via Mitchelton-Scott defeating Jumbo-Visma by 7 seconds with De Klecher Quick-Step surprisingly 37 seconds down despite leading at checkpoints
tactical_patterns: Deceuninck Quick-Step fastest at intermediate checkpoint but faded 37 seconds by finish, revealing pacing misjudgment
Mitchelton-Scott starting last gained tactical advantage seeing all rival times before execution
Sunweb relegated Jumbo-Visma to third despite being non-GC favorites, showing depth underestimation
Jumbo-Visma kept Roglic within 7 seconds but protecting leaders cost podium position

rider_signals.YATES Adam: positive: 37-second gap over Alaphilippe from TTT creates defensible GC position against superior stage racer
rider_signals.ALAPHILIPPE Julian: negative: 37-second deficit likely insurmountable against climber like Yates in week-long stage race
rider_signals.DUMOULIN Tom: neutral: Sunweb only 15 seconds behind Jumbo-Visma suggests form rehabilitation underway
rider_signals.ROGLIC Primoz: positive: Jumbo-Visma prioritized protecting him over podium finish showing clear GC commitment
